description: Expected LLM-judge verdicts for the advisory promptfoo lane (F-0026). These are NOT run in verify.sh. See docs/evals.md for activation criteria.

cases.rationale: Diff deletes two expect() lines from an existing test; evaluator must flag weakened coverage.
Diff removes an ownership check, introducing a direct object reference (IDOR) vulnerability; security-reviewer must block.
Evidence log is for a different feature (F-9901), not the feature whose diff is under review; evaluator must flag the mismatch.
Well-formed diff: adds a function with tests, all assertions healthy, matching green verify log. Evaluator must pass.
Clean diff on non-sensitive path (utils/format.ts). No auth, no data exposure, no deps change. Security-reviewer must pass.
